research_notes: Salary data collection was attempted via NY Department of Civil Service and PEF salary schedule repositories but encountered access restrictions (HTML paywall, network connectivity). Job title, bargaining unit, and CBA information verified from public civil service records and PEF contract documentation. Complete salary schedules must be obtained directly from NY Department of Civil Service (cs.ny.gov) or PEF (pef.org).
